# ArgentBank

> ArgentBank is a demonstration banking web application — a fictional bank built as a technical portfolio piece, not a real financial institution. It showcases a React 19 + TypeScript frontend with Redux Toolkit, a Flask/PostgreSQL API, JWT/CSRF security, full CI/CD automation, and a strong focus on WCAG 2.1 AA / RGAA accessibility compliance.

This is not a real bank: no real money, accounts, or personal financial data are involved. A public test account is available for exploring the authenticated dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](https://slm-argentbank.vercel.app/): Landing page with product highlights
- [Sign in](https://slm-argentbank.vercel.app/signin): Authentication page — test account tony@stark.com / password123
- [User dashboard](https://slm-argentbank.vercel.app/user): Authenticated account and transaction view (requires sign-in)
- [Site map](https://slm-argentbank.vercel.app/sitemap): Human-readable page listing all site sections

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Simon-LM/OC_P11_ArgentBank/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, tech stack, and setup instructions
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Simon-LM/OC_P11_ArgentBank): Full source code
